module_exit_outcome: Learner can greet people politely, introduce themselves at a basic level, ask who/what/where questions, and survive the first minute of a conversation.
Learner can map Thai sounds to key script patterns, recognize consonant classes and core vowels, and read very short Thai words with support.
Learner can build and answer short Thai sentences about identity, possession, qualities, and everyday objects using core beginner structures.
Learner can use practical Thai for numbers, time, dates, prices, directions, transport, ordering, and paying in everyday survival situations.
Learner can describe family, home, routines, meals, hobbies, likes, dislikes, and simple personal plans in everyday Thai.
Learner can ask clearer questions, understand practical written input like menus and signs, and repair communication breakdowns politely.
Learner can read common Thai spelling patterns more smoothly, handle short notices and dialogues, and rely less on transliteration.
Learner can manage restaurant, market, clothes, bargaining, and delivery interactions with more natural vocabulary and comparison language.
Learner can navigate routes, transport, check-in, accommodation, and basic travel problem solving in Thai.
Learner can talk about past experiences, future intentions, appointments, obligations, invitations, and short personal stories with clearer sequencing.
Learner can talk about friendship, personality, emotions, opinions, agreement, compliments, dating-safe conversation, and social plans with more nuance.
Learner can manage common work, study, clinic, banking, housing, and repair interactions in Thai.
Learner can narrate longer events, explain causes and choices, connect ideas smoothly, and give supported opinions in Thai.
Learner can explain problems clearly, complain appropriately, ask for urgent help, and handle higher-stress interactions in Thai.
Learner can handle forms, appointments, documents, rules, and polite administrative requests with solid functional control.

module_title: Media, Digital Thai, and Cultural Literacy
module_exit_outcome: Learner can follow online Thai, social media tone, basic news-lite content, cultural references, and etiquette-linked language more independently.
Learner can discuss goals, work topics, tradeoffs, persuasion, and hypotheticals in lower-stakes professional Thai.
Learner can perform integrated B2-level social, service, professional, reading, and listening tasks with enough control for real-life independent use.
